payload.claim_text: Custom Glass is the sole responsible source for the components that will be provided under this contract. Other vendors do not have access to the proprietary designs, specifications, and drawings for these systems or materials and therefore cannot readily provide these components.
payload.subject: Custom Glass Solutions Trumbauersville LLC
payload.description: Justification for sole-source procurement of window assemblies from Custom Glass

payload.claim_text: USSC is the sole source for components provided under this contract. Other vendors do not have access to the proprietary designs, specifications, and drawings for these systems or materials and therefore cannot readily provide them.

tool_args.label: Luminator alternate sourcing for 4 high-usage parts

payload.claim_text: LIRR pursued alternate sourcing for four high-usage parts that were originally included in this solicitation. LIRR and MNR engineering departments approved these alternate sources for the designated items, which enabled the Railroads to remove them from the sole-source agreement and utilize the competitive bidding process in the future.
payload.subject: Luminator Technology Group LLC
payload.description: Four high-usage parts were removed from Luminator sole-source agreement for future competitive bidding
